text:
Employee Benefits
Employee Benefits
Employee Benefits
Health Insurance
All full-time employees receive comprehensive medical insurance
coverage for themselves and dependents.
Wellness Program
The company provides a wellness allowance of AED 1000 per year that
can be used for gym memberships, sports activities, or health
programs.
Training and Development
Employees are eligible for up to AED 5000 per year for professional
development courses and certifications.
Probation Period
The probation period lasts for 6 months. During probation, some
benefits may be limited.

# IT Setup Guide
## Laptop Request
New employees receive a company laptop during onboarding.
Laptop requests must be submitted through the IT portal.
## VPN Access
Employees who work remotely must connect to the company network through
the VPN.
VPN access requires approval from the employee's manager and IT
administrator.
## Software Installation
Employees may install approved productivity tools such as Slack, Zoom,
and Microsoft Office.
Administrative permissions are required to install development tools.

# Employee Leave Policy
## Annual Leave
All full-time employees are entitled to **24 days of annual leave per
year**.
Leave accrues monthly and must be approved by the employee's reporting
manager before being taken.
## Sick Leave
Employees may take **up to 10 days of paid sick leave annually** with
medical documentation.
If sick leave exceeds 3 consecutive days, a medical certificate is
required.
## Public Holidays
Employees are entitled to all officially recognized UAE public holidays.
## Carry Forward Policy
Employees may carry forward a maximum of **5 unused leave days** to the
next calendar year.
Any additional unused leave will expire at the end of the year.

Security Incident Response Guidelines
If an employee receives a suspicious email that may be phishing, the
employee must not click any links or download attachments.
Steps to follow: 1. Immediately report the email to the IT Security
team. 2. Forward the email to security@company.com. 3. Delete the email
after reporting it.
Lost Laptop Procedure: If a company laptop is lost or stolen, employees
must report the incident to IT within 2 hours.
The IT department will remotely disable access and revoke credentials.
Password Security: Employees must use multi-factor authentication (MFA)
for all company systems. Passwords must be at least 12 characters long
and should not be reused across systems.

Hotel | 500 | AED | Finance
